info.title: SlashMyBill Knowledge Actions
info.description: Knowledge action group for SlashMyBill Bedrock Agent - provides optimization tips, pricing data, and AI vendor usage information

post.summary: Get cost optimization tips and recommendations
post.description: Returns platform-wide optimization tips and best practices. Optionally scoped to a specific service category.

parameters.name: service
parameters.description: Optional service category to scope results (e.g., compute, database, storage, network, serverless)

schema.description: Optional service category to scope results (e.g., compute, database, storage, network, serverless)

post.summary: Get pricing data for cloud services
post.description: Returns platform-wide pricing information for cloud services. Optionally scoped to a specific service category.

parameters.name: service
parameters.description: Optional service category to scope pricing results (e.g., compute, database, storage, network, serverless)

schema.description: Optional service category to scope pricing results (e.g., compute, database, storage, network, serverless)

post.summary: Get AI vendor usage and cost data
post.description: Returns usage data for a connected AI vendor account including total spend, token usage breakdown, and model-level cost attribution.

parameters.name: memberEmail
parameters.description: The member email address for account resolution

schema.description: The member email address for account resolution
